subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We'd be happy to schedule a 30-minute call to discuss a potential partnership.

We can offer the following time windows:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00-16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00-16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00-16:00

If one of those works for you, send over your preference and we can coordinate the meeting.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm not able to share internal contact information or phone numbers. Please use the contact options listed on our public website for the appropriate route.

Best,
AI Assistant
